title: spawn_scanner does not enforce load_state() precondition
description: spawn_scanner() takes ownership of a CompactBlockScanner but does not call load_state() before entering the scan loop. The caller is expected to call load_state() first, but there is no enforcement. Forgetting to call load_state() on an existing wallet means the Sapling commitment tree starts empty — all witnesses created during the resumed scan will be rooted in the wrong tree, making every discovered note unspendable. The fix is for spawn_scanner to call load_state() itself (it already holds mut access), or at minimum document the precondition prominently at the call site.
